name: translation-request
description: Automates creating translation request task cards in Notion's Global Translation project. Accepts a project Notion link and Lokalise URL, generates English descriptions, and creates fully-formed cards with correct assignees, locales, and deadlines.

skills.name: translation-request-knowledge
skills.description: Provides Global Translation Notion DB schema, locale-to-assignee mappings, card body template, and deadline calculation rules.

commands.name: translation-request
commands.description: Creates a translation request task card in Notion's Global Translation DB from a project URL and Lokalise URL.

agents.name: notion-card-writer
agents.description: Specialized agent that takes finalized card data and creates the Notion page with correct formatting.
